parameters.query: SELECT * FROM uploads WHERE traite = false OR traite IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC

UPDATE uploads SET traite = {{ $json.traite }}, notes = '{{ $json.notes || "" }}', nom_fichier = COALESCE('{{ $json.pdf_filename }}', nom_fichier), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.pdf_id }}' RETURNING *

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pdfUrl: 'http://192.168.1.70:5678/webhook/serve-upload?f=' + $('Prepare Invoice PDF').first().json.pdfId + '_' + $('Prepare Invoice PDF').first().json.currentPages.replace(/,/g,'-') + '.pdf', pdfText: $('Prepare Invoice PDF').first().json.extractedText, pdfId: $('Prepare Invoice PDF').first().json.pdfId, factureNum: $('Prepare Invoice PDF').first().json.factureNum, driveFileId: '' }) }}
